privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated parameters for a spacecraft passivation maneuver explicitly injected via setup_task.sh. The expected initial mass is mathematically confirmed as 500.0 kg (475.0 kg dry + 25.0 kg fuel), and final mass is 475.0 kg. The expected burn duration is calculated via orbital mechanics (Thrust 22N, Isp 225s, Fuel 25kg, g0 9.80665) to be approximately 2507.38 seconds, which aligns with the metadata claim of 2508.0 seconds within the allowed 50-second tolerance. The target script and report paths exactly match the task description instructions, export scripts, and verifier logic.
